description: Provider-agnostic agent invocation profile for Phase6 runners.

agent_cmd.description: Optional explicit shell command. If absent, runner falls back to built-in provider default.

env.description: Optional environment map merged into runner env for agent execution.

env_map.description: Optional env propagation mapping from source env key to target env key.

prompt_arg.description: Argument flag used when prompt_transport=arg (for example: --prompt-file).

prompt_transport.description: How prompt path is supplied when provider defaults are used.

title: leanatlas.agent_profile
